summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/11/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.32% today, the main contract closed 769. The traders' willingness to ship is more.The steel mills are purchase on demand. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
